description: This pipeline processes data by first removing specified columns from a table, and then executes a custom Python script on the resulting table to further modify its contents.

25ad4dcd-72cf-4862-a784-b77e3423e36f.name: table-remove-columns
25ad4dcd-72cf-4862-a784-b77e3423e36f.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

6dc397e7-5d3f-4e20-906b-bfaa63dd377e.name: modify-tables
6dc397e7-5d3f-4e20-906b-bfaa63dd377e.description: Executes a Python-script for each table. Each table is passed as dictionary 'table' with the column name as key and values being an array of strings or doubles. The number of input rows can be accessed via the 'nrow' variable.
